name: Elegant Apple Dumpling
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup apple juice or apple cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add butter and shortening; work into a crumbly mixture.
3. Gradually add apple juice or cider until a smooth dough forms.
4. In a separate pan, melt butter.
5. Add brown sugar, crushed gingersnaps, ground pecans, Grand Mariner, and cinnamon to the melted butter.
6. Core 3/4 of an apple (preferably Granny Smith), ensuring ample space for filling.
7. Roll out dough thinly; wrap around the apple.
8. Squeeze off excess dough to create leaves on top of the apple.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes, or until the dough turns light to golden brown. Check frequently as it won't darken significantly.
10. The dough recipe yields enough for two apples. Optionally, use a small piece of cinnamon stick for the stem.
